crew-code-reviewer.description: Reviews all branches merged in a sprint session; reports CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW findings per branch. Findings are advisory — no branch is blocked or re-queued.

crew-coder.description: Implements a single issue using TDD, verifies checks, commits.

crew-afk.description: Orchestrator that spawns parallel crew-coder agents in isolated worktrees, merges completed branches, runs a crew-code-reviewer pass, and loops until all ready-for-agent issues are done.

karpathy-guidelines.description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes (think, simplify, surgical, goal-driven).

tdd.description: Test-driven development with red-green-refactor loop, vertical slices.

dep-install.description: Detect install mode (host or docker) and install project dependencies once. Shared by solve-issue, crew-address-findings, and address-pr-comments.

solve-issue.description: Implement a single issue end-to-end: read, explore, install, TDD, verify, commit.

crew-address-findings.description: Triage and fix findings from a crew-afk code review report using TDD.

address-pr-comments.description: Fetch PR review comments, challenge each critically, implement sensible ones with TDD, commit and push.

improve-codebase-architecture.description: Find deepening opportunities — refactors that turn shallow modules into deep ones for testability and AI-navigability.

grill-me.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan until reaching shared understanding. Exploratory only — no implementation.

grill-with-docs.description: Grilling session that challenges a plan against the domain model, sharpens terminology, updates CONTEXT.md and ADRs inline.

to-issues.description: Break a plan or PRD into independently-grabbable issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices.

to-prd.description: Synthesize conversation context into a PRD and publish to the issue tracker.

crew-plan.description: Full design pipeline: grill → PRD → issues. One handoff after grilling triggers the rest automatically.

caveman.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by speaking like caveman while keeping full technical accuracy. Supports lite/full/ultra and wenyan intensity levels.

configure-tracker.description: Select and install an issue tracker template. Presents a numbered menu of templates from docs/templates/trackers/, then writes the chosen template to the project-level or user-level config path.
